headline: Fox Stock Upgraded As Roku Acquisition Reconsidered
summary: A Wall Street analyst upgraded Fox stock to buy, saying its drop on the Roku acquisition news was an overreaction.

raw.headline: Fox Stock Upgraded As Roku Acquisition Reconsidered

headline: Wolfe Research lifts Fox rating, says Roku merger unlocks faster growth
summary: Investing.com -- Wolfe Research has upgraded Fox Corp. to Outperform from Peer Perform in a note on Wednesday, setting a $71 price target and arguing that the company's planned merger with Roku creates a more dynamic growth story than the market is currently pricing in.
